description: LOTS OF SPACE HERE! This nearly 2000 SQUARE FOOT three level townhome in well maintained UPTON PLACE offers spacious living, all four bathrooms have been updated along with a renovated kitchen, newer appliances & a high efficiency furnace. Three spacious bedrooms up & possibly FOUR BEDROOMS as the ground level rec-room could easily be used as a bedroom & has a 3 piece bathroom right beside. (great for extended family). There is a FENCED YARD for the kids & a good size balcony off the main living area for those summertime activities. For your Enjoyment & FUN there are RESORT like amenities including an outdoor swimming pool, tennis court, exercise area & a large social room. Quiet yet centrally located near transit, schools, shopping & other amenities. Call to view TODAY!
